description_long: This is a Crosley portable record player housed in a rectangular, hard-shell case with rounded corners and a hinged lid. The exterior is a muted green color, and the lid features the Crosley logo embossed at the center. The interior reveals a circular turntable platter, a tonearm with a stylus, and several control knobs and switches, all set into a black control panel. The front of the case has two metal latches and a handle for carrying, while the side features a speaker grille. The overall design is compact and retro, with a matte finish and visible seams where the lid meets the base.
description: A compact, retro Crosley record player in a green hard-shell case with a hinged lid, visible turntable, tonearm, and control knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with Crosley logo, turntable platter, tonearm, and control panel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the case, the open lid, and the speaker grille on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the closed back of the case and the hinge mechanism for the lid.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the turntable platter and tonearm, with the open lid and case profile visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and centrally located within the case. It is black with a slightly textured, matte finish and features concentric grooves typical of record platters. Its diameter occupies a significant portion of the interior, making it the dominant feature inside the case.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, positioned to the right of the platter, and appears to be made of black plastic or metal. It is straight with a visible pivot joint at the base and is currently resting in its holder, not over the platter.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small component attached to the end of the tonearm. It is small, pointed, and likely made of metal and plastic, appearing as a distinct part from the tonearm.
attribute_control_knobs: Several control knobs and buttons are present on the right side of the control panel. They are round, black, and of varying sizes, with some featuring silver tops. No visible labels or markings are discernible in the images.
attribute_dust_cover: The dust cover is present as the hinged lid of the case. It is made of opaque green plastic, matching the exterior, and is attached with metal hinges at the back. The lid is currently open and does not appear to be transparent.
